skills.name: search-letters
skills.description: Search through 665 WW1-era Danish letters by date, sender, recipient, place, keywords, or semantic similarity. Covers structured filtering, full-text search, and topic-based exploration.

skills.name: read-letter
skills.description: Read a specific WW1 letter by ID (1-665) from jernkorset.dk. Retrieve original and modern Danish text, sentiment scores, associated images, and related letters.

skills.name: lookup-person
skills.description: Look up people mentioned in 665 WW1 Danish letters. Find biographies, letter references, social connections, and network centrality for 60 persons including soldiers, family, and community members.

skills.name: lookup-place
skills.description: Look up places mentioned in 665 WW1 Danish letters. Find coordinates, Wikidata links, historical context, and letters from 75 locations across the Eastern and Western fronts.

skills.name: browse-data
skills.description: Discover and use 30 static JSON data endpoints on jernkorset.dk. Covers letters, persons, places, NLP analysis (sentiment, emotions, psycholinguistics), social network, embeddings, and WW1 historical data.
